caption: The video begins with a view of a hallway leading to two open doors, one on the left and one on the right. The camera then moves forward into the room on the left, which is a modern bathroom. Inside, there is a glass-enclosed shower with a rain showerhead and a handheld shower. To the left of the shower, there is a bathtub with a faucet and a window above it, allowing natural light to enter. The bathroom has white tiled walls and a clean, minimalist design. The camera pans around the bathroom, showcasing its features and layout, before coming to a stop, providing a comprehensive view of the space.
